A Digital Marketer, Affiliate Expert & Content Creator

Frequently Asked Questions

Will Shashank teach this course himself? ⌄
Yes! Shashank personally teaches every module in his own voice. You get direct access to his proven strategies and real earnings experience in affiliate marketing.
What is the time validity of this course? ⌄
Once you purchase the course, you get lifetime access! Watch videos at your own pace, anytime, anywhere — even years from now with all future updates included.
Will I get a certificate as proof of my learning? ⌄
Yes! Upon completing the course curriculum, you receive a signed Creatorship certificate from Shashank himself, which you can share on LinkedIn and other platforms.
Which language is this course taught in? ⌄
This course is taught entirely in Kannada, making it perfectly suited for Kannada-speaking learners who want to master affiliate marketing in their native language.
I am facing problems with payment processing when buying this course, what should I do? ⌄
Please reach out to our support team via email. We offer UPI, Net Banking, Credit/Debit cards. Our team will assist you within 24 hours to resolve any payment issues.
What will I be able to do after completing this course? ⌄
After completing, you'll choose a profitable niche, find and promote affiliate products, drive traffic, and start earning ₹50,000 to ₹1,00,000 per month through affiliate marketing.
